scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/runner-protocol typecheck && bun --cwd packages/runner-protocol build && bun --cwd packages/runner typecheck
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/runner-protocol build && bun --cwd packages/runner-protocol test && bun --cwd packages/runner test
scripts.build: bun --cwd packages/runner-protocol build && bun --cwd packages/runner build
